testcase.system-out: 2026-03-09T12:07:02.772+08:00 INFO 25560 --- [java-ai-langchain4j] [ main] t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils : Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.atguigu.MongoCrudTest]: MongoCrudTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-03-09T12:07:02.775+08:00 INFO 25560 --- [java-ai-langchain4j] [ main] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.atguigu.JavaAiLangchain4jApplication for test class com.atguigu.MongoCrudTest null
